query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.pendingPlanType, u.pendingPlanPaidAt, u.stripeCustomerId, u.kycStatus FROM users u ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC;

SELECT po.id, po.userId, po.orderType, po.amountJpy, po.status, po.createdAt FROM payment_orders po ORDER BY po.createdAt DESC;
